case_title: DEAN SORGIE VS. JULIO CESAR SANCHEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SORGIE, DEAN SORGIE, CATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, JULIO CESAR BLUE WATER TOWING DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-21-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-20-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-30-2017
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR AUG-21-2017. THE JUN-21-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEMAND FOR JURY (TRANSACTION ID # 60197798) FILED BY DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, JULIO CESAR BLUE WATER TOWING
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME (TRANSACTION ID # 60486214) FILED BY ATTORNEY GARBER, BRENNAIN J.
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 60197798) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, JULIO CESAR
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR RICHARD C. VALERIAN.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE AUG-31-2017.
ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST OF SEP-01-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE.
ARBITRATOR WILLIAM THOMAS MULVIHILL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-01-2017 THROUGH NOV-30-2017.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60197798) FILED BY DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, JULIO CESAR BLUE WATER TOWING
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100023263)
